nodes.name: 外来捕食者
nodes.summary: 岛屿鸟类常受猫、鼬和鼠等外来种影响。

nodes.name: 大西洋
nodes.summary: 大西洋是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括笛鸻、北极海鹦、South American tern等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 夏尔·吕西安·波拿巴
nodes.summary: 夏尔·吕西安·波拿巴是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联32种鸟类，包括红头林䳍、非洲鸽、Horned coot等32种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 亚速尔群岛
nodes.summary: 亚速尔群岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括西方秧鸡、大藍鷺、Barolo shearwater等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Barolo shearwater
nodes.summary: Barolo shearwater（Barolo shearwater，学名 Puffinus baroli），主要分布于夏尔·吕西安·波拿巴、亚速尔群岛、大西洋，主要威胁包括外来捕食者。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Barolo shearwater (Puffinus baroli), also known as the North Atlantic little shearwater or Macaronesian shearwater, is a small shearwater which breeds in the Azores and Canaries of Macaronesia in the North Atlantic Ocean

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Barolo shearwater (Puffinus baroli), also known as the North Atlantic little shearwater or Macaronesian shearwater, is a small shearwater which breeds in the Azores and Canaries of Macaronesia in the North Atlantic Ocean

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Barolo shearwater (Puffinus baroli), also known as the North Atlantic little shearwater or Macaronesian shearwater, is a small shearwater which breeds in the Azores and Canaries of Macaronesia in the North Atlantic Ocean

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Like other Procellariforms, introduced predators, such as rats and cats, are their main threat at breeding colonies
